sources.label: School cumulative file summary
sources.content: Cumulative file for current evaluation. Student is in 4th grade. Attendance is regular. Tier 2 reading intervention documented for the current school year. No IEP or 504 plan on file. Health card lists no known allergies.

sources.label: Classroom teacher questionnaire
sources.content: Grade 4 classroom teacher. Reading fluency remains below grade peers; spelling is weak. Homework completion inconsistent when writing is required. No behavioral referrals this year.

sources.label: Current psycho-educational assessment notes
sources.content: Referral for learning concerns in reading fluency and written expression. Student presents as cooperative during testing. No prior formal special education eligibility documented in the referral packet.

expected_facts.statement: Student is in 4th grade. Attendance is regular.
Reading fluency remains below grade peers; spelling is weak.
No prior formal special education eligibility documented.
